name: Processing
description: Java-based creative coding environment for visual arts. Beginner-friendly with a large community and extensive library ecosystem.

name: p5.js
description: JavaScript library for creative coding, built on Processing's principles. Runs in the browser with a beginner-friendly web editor.

name: openFrameworks
description: C++ toolkit for creative coding. Wraps OpenGL, audio, video, and hardware I/O in a consistent API across platforms.

name: TouchDesigner
description: Node-based visual programming for real-time interactive multimedia. Used for installations, live visuals, and projection mapping.

name: Shadertoy
description: Browser-based GLSL shader editor with a community gallery of thousands of shaders. Real-time rendering with WebGL.

name: GLSL Sandbox
description: Minimal in-browser fragment shader editor with a public gallery. Write, fork, and remix shaders with instant visual feedback.

name: Nannou
description: Creative coding framework for Rust. Inspired by Processing and openFrameworks, with safe concurrency and GPU access via wgpu.

name: Hydra
description: Live-codeable video synthesizer in the browser. Analog-synth-inspired syntax for real-time visuals, supports WebRTC streaming.

name: Cables.gl
description: Visual programming environment for WebGL and WebGPU. Node-based patching for interactive 3D graphics, free and open source.

name: SuperCollider
description: Environment for audio synthesis and algorithmic composition. Includes a real-time audio server, interpreted language, and IDE.

name: Pure Data
description: Visual programming language for audio, music, and multimedia by Miller Puckette. Patch-based dataflow environment.

name: Max/MSP
description: Visual programming environment for music, audio, and multimedia by Cycling '74. Extensible with JavaScript, Gen~, and RNBO.

name: Csound
description: Sound and music computing system with 1500+ opcodes. Descended from MUSIC-N, used in academia and production since 1985.

name: ChucK
description: Strongly-timed, concurrent audio programming language from Stanford/Princeton. Supports live coding and on-the-fly modification.

name: Tone.js
description: Web Audio framework for interactive music in the browser. Provides synths, effects, scheduling, and a global transport.

name: FAUST
description: Functional language for audio DSP. Compiles to C++, WebAssembly, Rust, and plugin formats (VST, AU, Max, Pd, etc.).

name: VCV Rack
description: Virtual Eurorack modular synthesizer with 2000+ community modules. Free standalone; Pro adds DAW plugin support.

name: Unity Shader Graph
description: Visual shader editor for Unity. Drag-and-drop nodes to create shaders for URP and HDRP without writing code.

name: Godot Shading Language
description: Godot's built-in GLSL-like shader language. Covers spatial, canvas, particle, sky, and fog shaders with full editor integration.

name: wgpu
description: Safe, portable Rust graphics API implementing the WebGPU standard. Runs on Vulkan, Metal, DX12, OpenGL ES, and WebGPU.

name: bgfx
description: Cross-platform, API-agnostic rendering library. Supports Direct3D, Metal, Vulkan, OpenGL, and WebGPU from one codebase.

name: Vulkan SDK
description: LunarG SDK for the Vulkan graphics and compute API. Includes validation layers, shader tools, and debugging utilities.

name: Metal
description: Apple's low-overhead GPU API for graphics and compute. Tightly integrated with Apple silicon for maximum performance.

name: Three.js
description: Lightweight JavaScript 3D library built on WebGL. Widely used for 3D games, visualizations, and interactive web experiences.

name: UltiMaker Cura
description: Open-source 3D printing slicer with 400+ settings. Trusted by millions, supports hundreds of printer profiles out of the box.

name: PrusaSlicer
description: Feature-rich slicer for FDM and resin printers by Prusa Research. Frequent updates, strong defaults, advanced multi-material support.

name: OrcaSlicer
description: Fast, open-source slicer forked from PrusaSlicer and BambuStudio. Strong Bambu Lab support and active community development.

name: SuperSlicer
description: PrusaSlicer fork with extra calibration tools and tuning options. Aimed at users who want more control over print parameters.

name: Meshmixer
description: Autodesk's mesh editing and 3D print prep tool. Repairs, hollows, slices, and sculpts STL/OBJ files. Legacy but still functional.
